title: [codex] fix: disable tier refill cron
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes Cloudflare cron triggers for Enter local, staging, and production environments.
- Stops the scheduled tier refill pipeline from running recurring hourly tier drips.
- Leaves manual admin refill code and broader tier-to-rewards cleanup untouched for the larger #11375 work.

Validation:
- `npx biome check --write enter.pollinations.ai/wrangler.toml` (ignored by Biome)
- `npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.toml --env production`
- `npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.toml --env staging`
- `npx wrangler deploy --dry-run --config wrangler.toml --env local`

gist.headline: Pausing the drip
gist.blurb: We've paused the automated hourly tier refills while we work on some larger infrastructure updates. Manual refills are still standing by!
gist.summary: Disabled the Cloudflare cron triggers for automated hourly tier refills across all environments in preparation for broader tier-to-rewards cleanup.
gist.impact: Automated hourly tier drips are paused, though manual admin refills remain available during this transition.
gist.visual_concept: The bee mascot turning off a dripping faucet or a giant hourglass, with the robot companion holding a wrench.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny yellow hardhat, turning a large valve to stop a dripping water pipe. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head stands nearby holding a wrench. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
